description_long: This is a standard-sized basketball adorned with a patriotic American flag motif. The upper hemisphere is predominantly blue, decorated with white stars of varying sizes, while the lower hemisphere features bold red and white stripes wrapping around the circumference. The word 'USA' is prominently displayed in large, blue-outlined block letters on one side, set against the striped background. The surface is textured with a typical pebbled rubber finish, and the seams are visible, dividing the ball into traditional basketball panels. There are no visible signs of wear, dirt, or graffiti, and no brand logo is present.
description: A patriotic basketball with a blue star-spangled upper half, red and white striped lower half, and 'USA' text on one side. The surface is textured and clean, with visible seams.
description_view_0: The view shows the blue star-patterned upper half and red and white stripes, with no visible text or logos.
description_view_1: This view highlights the 'USA' text in blue block letters on the striped background, with stars visible above.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side displays the blue star field and stripes, with no text or logos visible.
description_view_3: The 'USA' text is again visible, centered on the striped section, with stars above, similar to view 1.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with traditional basketball seams, panels alternating between blue with stars and red/white stripes.
